strengths: 15+ years across web, mobile, embedded, and backend engineering
Founder of open-source GIS platform showing entrepreneurial drive
Exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
concerns: Title is Senior/Staff, not Principal or Director-level IC
Limited demonstrated AI/ML product or platform leadership
No advanced degree in AI and minimal cloud-platform strategy scope
response.justification: The candidate brings broad, hands-on engineering experience across many stacks and domains, plus founder-level initiative through GISCollective and early exposure to AI-agent tooling. However, the trajectory is senior/staff IC rather than director-level principal, and there is limited evidence of recognized AI expertise, large-scale cloud platform strategy, or shipped AI products at the scope this role demands.
